subcodes.title: Khatt ila Mirza Siyyid Hasan-i-Khurasani
subcodes.first_line: God, no God is there but Him. He hath sent down the Book in truth for a Day whereof there is no doubt. Worship Him and await His triumph, for verily the days of remembrance with thy Lord have been ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الله لا اله الا هو قد نزل الکتاب بالحق لیوم لاریب فیه و اعبده و انتظر لنصره فان ایام الذکر عند ربک کان مقضیا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
